what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG icon showing an outlined circle with three small horizontal dots centered inside, using currentColor for stroke and dot fill.
observations: Root svg uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with fill set to none and stroke set to currentColor.
The outer circle is centered at 12,12 with radius 9.
Three inner circles are centered at x positions 8, 12, and 16 on y=12 with radius 1 and fill currentColor.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round linecap and round linejoin.
The SVG is written as a single compact line.
standouts: CurrentColor makes the icon inherit surrounding text or UI color.
The three centered dots communicate a pending or waiting state within a circular outline.
conventions: Uses stroke-based outline styling with round caps and joins.
Uses semantic SVG primitives rather than path data.
Keeps the asset self-contained with no external references.
concerns: Inner filled dots also inherit the root stroke, so their rendered size may be larger than the radius alone suggests.
Single-line formatting reduces readability for manual editing.
notes: This file is a compact pending-status SVG icon composed from one outline circle and three filled center dots.
questions: Should the inner dots inherit the root stroke, or should they be fill-only?
Is the circular outline part of the intended pending indicator in all usages?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a pending-dot icon, and the SVG depicts a circular pending indicator with three dots.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a scalable, color-adaptive pending or in-progress icon for use in UI surfaces.
contribution: Contributes a simple currentColor-based pending indicator with a circular outline and three-dot motif that can be retained as a scalable status icon asset.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG pending icon made from an outlined circle containing three horizontally aligned filled dots.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for representing a pending, waiting, or in-progress UI state with a compact reusable icon.
